opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My leg feels like it is exploding inside the cast, and the pain is a million times worse than when I actually broke the bone!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe, worsening leg pain inside a cast applied earlier today for a broken shin bone.

symptom_narrative.onset: developed over the past 4 hours since a cast was applied earlier today
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: far worse than the original fracture pain, unbearable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: entire lower leg inside the cast
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: progressively worsening despite strong pain medication
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing, not even the prescribed painkiller
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to move the toes causes excruciating pain
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: pins and needles over the top of the foot developing recently
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: sustained a closed tibial (shin bone) fracture earlier today, casted at a clinic
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: writhing and crying in agony, unable to find any comfortable position

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: took the prescribed dose about an hour ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: parent present and very concerned, cast was applied at a clinic earlier today

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: in agony and desperate for relief, parent very frightened

access_barriers.transport: parent present but patient in too much pain to move independently, may need ambulance
